summary: Tested Sistema de Control de Costos y Asistente de Compras Inteligente. All 19 backend tests passed. All UI features verified via Playwright. Fixed a MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in price-history endpoint.

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent} - accessibility enhancement suggested

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/purchasing/suggestions returns 200 with suggestions array
Backend: Suggestions have all required fields (ingredient_id, ingredient_name, current_stock, suggested_quantity, etc.)
Backend: Suggestions summary contains totals (total_items, low_stock_items, out_of_stock_items, estimated_total)
Backend: Filter by supplier_id works correctly
Backend: Filter by warehouse_id works correctly
Backend: GET /api/purchasing/price-alerts returns 200
Backend: Price alerts summary has total_alerts and avg_increase fields
Backend: Price alert items have required fields (ingredient_id, previous_price, latest_price, change_percentage)
Backend: POST /api/purchasing/recalculate-recipe-margins returns 200
Backend: Margin results include summary (total_recipes, critical_count, warning_count, ok_count, avg_margin)
Backend: Margin results have required fields (recipe_id, cost_per_unit, selling_price, margin_percentage, status)
Backend: Response contains separate critical and warning lists
Backend: GET /api/ingredients/{id}/price-history returns 200
Backend: Price history stats include avg_price, min_price, max_price, latest_price, trend
Backend: Invalid ingredient ID returns 404
Backend: POST /api/purchasing/generate-po validates supplier_id (returns 404 for invalid)
Backend: Full flow test - suggestions → select → generate PO works
Backend: Ingredient supports default_supplier_id field
Backend: Can update ingredient default_supplier_id
Frontend: Asistente tab is visible and clickable in /inventory-manager
Frontend: Three view buttons present: Sugerencias, Alertas Precio, Márgenes
Frontend: Supplier (Proveedor) and Warehouse (Almacén) filters in suggestions view
Frontend: 'Generar OC' button disabled when no items selected or no warehouse chosen
Frontend: Summary cards visible (Agotados, Stock Bajo, Sugerencias, Total Estimado)
Frontend: Price alerts view shows header and status (stable or alerts)
Frontend: Márgenes view has 'Recalcular Márgenes' button
Frontend: Margin summary cards (Críticos, Advertencia, OK, Margen Promedio) display after recalculation
Frontend: 'Proveedor Predeterminado' field present in ingredient edit dialog
Frontend: Default supplier dropdown includes 'Sin proveedor asignado' option
Frontend: Helper text about Asistente de Compras visible in dialog
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed MongoDB _id serialization in price-history aggregation pipeline)

bug_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId was not excluded from aggregation $project stage causing 500 error
bug_fixed.solution: Added '_id': 0 to $project stage in both price-history and price-alerts pipelines

returns.suggestions: Array of items to reorder with stock levels, consumption data, and pricing
returns.summary: Aggregated totals including estimated_total and breakdown by_supplier

price_alerts.detects: Price increases > 5% comparing latest vs previous purchase

returns.alerts: Array of ingredients with price increases

recipe_margins.calculates: Cost per unit, margin percentage, margin threshold

returns.history: Array of past purchases with prices

ingredient_default_supplier.purpose: Used by Asistente de Compras to filter and generate POs

features.sugerencias: Table with reorder suggestions, filters, checkboxes, Generar OC button
features.alertas_precio: List of price increase alerts or 'No hay alertas' message
features.margenes: Recalculate button, summary cards (Críticos, Advertencia, OK, Margen Promedio)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sistema de Control de Costos y Asistente de Compras fully working. Key endpoints: GET /api/purchasing/suggestions (stock-based reorder suggestions), GET /api/purchasing/price-alerts (price increase detection), POST /api/purchasing/recalculate-recipe-margins (margin analysis), GET /api/ingredients/{id}/price-history (purchase price history). Frontend has Asistente tab in /inventory-manager with three views. Fixed MongoDB _id serialization bug in price-history endpoint.

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
